ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the issue (e.g., TS-1100) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "action" TEXT /* Recommended action to resolve the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the issue */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Detailed resolution of the issue */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date by which the issue should be resolved */,
  "actual_resolution_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the issue was resolved */,
  "is_reopened" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the issue has been reopened */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the issue is private */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the issue */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES issue_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES issue_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_spent" TEXT /* Actual amount spent on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer the issue is assigned to */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the assignment */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority of the assignment */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date by which the issue should be completed */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the issue was completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES issue_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES issue_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the developer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the developer joined the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the developer's last login to the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the developer is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the developer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the issue (e.g., status updated) */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the history entry is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the history entry has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment belongs to */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File path to the attachment file */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was added */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the attachment is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the attachment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
